The Case for Decentralized AI Training in Space
“If AI training is becoming constrained by Earth’s geography, then the next frontier is not just bigger terrestrial clusters. It is distributed training across a new topology: ground data centers, edge devices, satellites, orbital compute nodes, & decentralized protocols all stitched into one learning network”
> Decentralized AI training in space entails satellites and orbital compute nodes not only running inference, but participating in training, fine-tuning, post-training, and eventually larger-scale model updates across a dynamic orbital network.
Source:
